column1: # Nano can't produce quant_bpb (import_error in export path), but train_loss is a valid
# same-machine comparator. Goal: confirm SCALAR_LR=0.030 and MATRIX_LR=0.040 are real
# improvements by reproducing the ordering on a third machine.
# Reduced batch (32768) + seq 1024 required for 7.4GB VRAM. LOGIT_SOFTCAP=1000 (disabled).
# TIMEOUT_SECS=1800; 150 steps takes ~1000s at reduced batch.
